With no hero cards visible, calling preserves stack depth at high SPR and avoids bloating the pot versus a range that can also be strong on this coordinated monotone-connected board.

Out of position in the big blind facing a single flop bet on a coordinated K-high board. Without hero cards, the safest legal default is to check rather than guess at a raise or call threshold. A check keeps the pot under control and preserves flexibility with high SPR.

Out of position on a coordinated K-7-6 two-tone flop with no hero cards shown, checking keeps the range protected and avoids bloating the pot with unknown hand strength.
